category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities for Enhanced Read-Only File System; official EROFS docs describe EROFS as a Linux immutable filesystem.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is erofs-utils; official EROFS docs refer to installing and building erofs-utils.
docs_sources: Official kernel.org EROFS docs provide overview, installation, and mkfs.erofs usage pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the kernel.org git repository; official EROFS install docs show cloning git://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/xiang/erofs-utils.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list mkfs.erofs, fsck.erofs, dump.erofs, erofsfuse, and mount.erofs; official docs describe EROFS filesystem utilities.
